extortion.description: High Arctic is an energy services provider. High Arctic is a market leader in Papua New Guinea providing drilling and specialized well completion services and supplies rental equipment including rig matting, camps, material handling and drilling support equipment. In western Canada High Arctic provides pressure control equipment on a rental basis to a number of exploration and production companies.SITE: www.haes.ca Address : 330 5th Ave SW Ste 2350, Calgary, Alberta, T2P 0L4, CanadaALL DATA SIZE: 345gb 1. Human Resources 2. Finance 3. Executive and Governance 4. Administration 5. Projects and etc…
